name: The Water Crisis

stages.name: Discoloration
stages.summary: The Echo River runs gray-green on bad mornings. Fish catches are down. Communities murmur but cooperate.

stages.name: First Sickness
stages.summary: Upstream fisher families fall ill. Boiling water becomes universal. Harmonic and Radiant leaders trade public accusations.

stages.name: Rationing
stages.summary: Millbrook posts guards at the clean springs. Water becomes currency. Explorer factions push to open the Archive for pre-Transition purification tech.

stages.name: The Brink
stages.summary: An armed standoff at the filtration arrays. One spark from open conflict. The true source, still unfound, accelerates.

hooks: Trace the contamination upstream past the Disputed Zone fringe
Investigate the Radiant filtration arrays and the falsified purity reports
Win Mara Wells' trust to learn what pattern she recognized
Ask the Archive Guardian what pre-Transition industry existed upstream
Follow Kit Farrow's account of survey-grid lights in the Zone at night
truth: GM-EYES-ONLY: The source is a pre-Transition nanite reclamation site in the upper Disputed Zone, disturbed and partially reactivated. It is not malfunctioning — it is following its last instruction: 'prepare the watershed.' Who or what reactivated it, and for whom the preparation is intended, is the campaign's deeper mystery and connects to the Precursor layer. Reveal in fragments; never state plainly before stage 3.
